---
title: redefines-builtin-id
description: "Avoid redefining predeclared identifiers."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🟡 `warning`

Avoid redefining predeclared identifiers. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func parse(error string) error
```

## Good

```go
func parse(input string) error
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only redefines-builtin-id`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
